subject: fix the build issue of the SO-docker
commit_message:
fix the build issue of the SO-docker

Issue-ID: SO-2765

Signed-off-by: seshukm <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: Ibcf2ac5a29eab84bda1c858354ff1f53518ceac9

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 7 on the queue.
